policy: Stage-local PASS requires deterministic synthetic Processed boundaries and explicit CONTROLLED_NOT_RUN status for every production or protected assertion; none can claim real template coverage, remote recovery, M3, Trash, publication or deployment.

resolutions.finding: No authoritative protected real Moomoo AU message or statement templates are available, and the frozen public Moomoo references returned access-denied responses during this run.
resolutions.resolution: Production classification and parser registries remain versioned and empty; no real label, filename, field or sender pattern is inferred, while synthetic profiles exercise algorithms only.

resolutions.finding: Every verified message must be retained even when no protected document profile matches.
resolutions.resolution: The classifier exposes all 18 frozen classes and deterministically maps zero or conflicting profile matches to VERIFIED_UNKNOWN rather than dropping the verified Raw.

resolutions.finding: Processed records need one source identity and complete private lineage without exposing Gmail IDs in diagnostics.
resolutions.resolution: The Document Envelope binds the verified Canonical Raw, HMAC source ID, ciphertext and plaintext digests, sender and classification registry versions, UTC and Australia/Sydney time, labels, attachments, parser, schema, key epoch and field origins; repr output redacts private values.

resolutions.finding: PDF, XLSX and CSV parsing can execute active content, recover damaged structures, follow links, exhaust resources or guess conflicting fields.
resolutions.resolution: Extraction is bounded and in-memory, disables PDF recovery, rejects workbook formulas and external-link structures, uses strict canonical text, and requires exact protected labels; conflicts quarantine and missing required fields safely defer.

resolutions.finding: Encrypted PDFs must not yield partial or guessed structured data without the correct protected Secret.
resolutions.resolution: Missing and incorrect Secrets converge to WAITING_FOR_PDF_PASSWORD with zero extracted artifacts; only an explicitly supplied correct in-memory Secret allows parsing, and no brute-force path exists.

resolutions.finding: Private Processed data must support deterministic migration and analysis while never persisting plaintext.
resolutions.resolution: The product builder emits deterministic Canonical JSONL and explicit-schema Parquet in memory; the only persistence plan encrypts every dataset, manifest and current pointer with official age before any adapter call.

resolutions.finding: Parser promotion requires parallel comparison over fourteen elapsed days and protected approval when business output changes.
resolutions.resolution: Synthetic tests prove immutable v1/v2 paths, a 14-day threshold, business-root comparison, signed approval binding and strict current CAS; no real elapsed observation or protected approval is claimed.

resolutions.finding: Public inventory must diagnose health without exposing exact counts, dates, source identifiers, statement values or private paths.
resolutions.resolution: The publisher emits only allowlisted dataset and version fields, availability, count and freshness buckets, conclusion enums, next-action enums and an HMAC opaque root; it performs no external write.

resolutions.finding: Real private append, decrypt, recovery, public publication and remote CI need protected credentials or an intermediate upload.
resolutions.resolution: Production-capable adapters remain uncalled, all recovery/public/M3 flags remain false, and remote CI is NOT_RUN until the single final publication.

resolutions.finding: M3, source Trash, timeline, 04:30 deployment and observation belong to later stages.
resolutions.resolution: Stage 4 contains no Gmail mutation, timeline renderer, production schedule or deployment path and makes no Stage 5+ acceptance claim.
